title: PAU Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The latest Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Research Fellow posts! Published on 18 May 2026 at Punjab Agricultural University Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing B.Sc. / B.Sc. (Agriculture), M.Sc. in Soil Science/Botany with NET qualification, or Ph.D. in the relevant discipline can apply offline from 18-05-2026 to 01-06-2026. Find all details about the PAU Research Fellow new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

qualification.details: B.Sc. / B.Sc. (Agriculture) with minimum OCPA 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. M.Sc. in Soil Science/Botany with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 basis or 65% marks. NET qualified (for M.Sc. candidates). Ph.D. in relevant discipline eligible in lieu of Master's degree.

salary_details.details: Rs.31000/- plus HRA per month fixed

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the PAU Research Fellow position is June 1, 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Fellow post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 31,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per university rules.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. or B.Sc. (Agriculture) degree with a minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks. Additionally, an M.Sc. in Soil Science or Botany with a minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks is required. NET qualification is mandatory for M.Sc. candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limit for this recruitment. However, it is always advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific guidelines or relaxations.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official PAU website, fill it out carefully, attach the required documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the PAU Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 200/-. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form as per the instructions in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is E.1.2026/787-96.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Research Fellow announced by Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, which is https://pau.edu.
